#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# Recipe Bottle Google OAuth - Service account JWT authentication

set -euo pipefail

# Multiple inclusion detection
test -z "${ZRBGO_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgo multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
ZRBGO_SOURCED=1

######################################################################
# Internal Functions (zrbgo_*)

zrbgo_kindle() {
  test -z "${ZRBGO_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgo already kindled"

  # Validate required tools (rehomed from rbl_Locator.sh)
  command -v openssl >/dev/null 2>&1 || buc_die "openssl not found - required for JWT signing and encoding"
  command -v curl    >/dev/null 2>&1 || buc_die "curl not found - required for OAuth exchange"
  command -v jq      >/dev/null 2>&1 || buc_die "jq not found - required for JSON parsing"

  buc_log_args "Ensure RBGC is kindled first"
  zrbgc_sentinel

  buc_log_args "Check environment"
  zburd_sentinel

  buc_log_args "Set Module Variables (ZRBGO_*)"
  readonly ZRBGO_JWT_HEADER_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgo_jwt_header.json"
  readonly ZRBGO_JWT_CLAIMS_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgo_jwt_claims.json"
  readonly ZRBGO_JWT_UNSIGNED_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgo_jwt_unsigned.txt"
  readonly ZRBGO_JWT_SIGNATURE_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgo_jwt_signature.txt"
  readonly ZRBGO_OAUTH_RESPONSE_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgo_oauth_response.json"
  readonly ZRBGO_OPENSSL_STDERR_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgo_openssl_stderr.txt"
  readonly ZRBGO_CURL_STDERR_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgo_curl_stderr.txt"
  readonly ZRBGO_JQ_STDERR_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgo_jq_stderr.txt"
  readonly ZRBGO_CONSUMER_RETRY_BODY_FILE="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgo_consumer_retry_body.json"

  readonly ZRBGO_KINDLED=1
}

zrbgo_sentinel() {
  test "${ZRBGO_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgo not kindled - call zrbgo_kindle first"
}

######################################################################
# Base64 primitives — generic openssl wrappers.
#
# Stateless — no sentinel; safe to call from any module regardless of
# kindle order. rbgo base64url-encodes JWT material; rbgg/rbgp decode SA
# private keys and rbfd decodes Cloud Build step outputs. The -A flag
# (suppress line wrapping) is load-bearing on every site and lives only
# here, so it cannot be silently dropped on one path.

rbgo_base64_decode_string_to_file() {
  local -r z_b64="${1:-}"
  local -r z_output="${2:-}"
  test -n "${z_b64}"    || return 1
  test -n "${z_output}" || return 1
  printf '%s' "${z_b64}" | openssl enc -base64 -d -A > "${z_output}" || return 1
}

rbgo_base64_decode_file_to_file() {
  local -r z_input="${1:-}"
  local -r z_output="${2:-}"
  test -n "${z_input}"  || return 1
  test -n "${z_output}" || return 1
  test -f "${z_input}"  || return 1
  openssl enc -base64 -d -A < "${z_input}" > "${z_output}" || return 1
}

rbgo_base64_encode_string_capture() {
  local -r z_input="${1:-}"
  printf '%s' "${z_input}" | openssl enc -base64 -A
}

rbgo_base64_encode_file_capture() {
  local -r z_file="${1:-}"
  test -f "${z_file}" || return 1
  openssl enc -base64 -A < "${z_file}"
}

zrbgo_base64url_encode_capture() {
  zrbgo_sentinel

  local -r z_input="${1:-}"

  # Base64url: encode, then URL-safe transform and strip = padding
  local z_encoded
  z_encoded=$(rbgo_base64_encode_string_capture "${z_input}") || {
    buc_warn "openssl base64url encode failed"
    return 1
  }
  z_encoded="${z_encoded//+/-}"
  z_encoded="${z_encoded//\//_}"
  z_encoded="${z_encoded//=/}"
  printf '%s' "${z_encoded}"
}

zrbgo_build_jwt_capture() {
  zrbgo_sentinel

  local -r z_rbra_file="$1"

  # RBRA_* expected: CLIENT_EMAIL, PRIVATE_KEY, TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC
  # RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY is sourced as a multi-line string (real newlines from PEM).
  # printf '%b' below is defensive and tolerates either real-newline or '\n'-escape
  # form; PEM keys contain no backslashes so %b is otherwise a no-op.
  # Only source if not already loaded (avoids readonly conflict in subshells)
  if test -z "${RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL:-}"; then
    buc_log_args "Source RBRA file"
    source "${z_rbra_file}" || return 1
  fi

  buc_log_args "Validate required variables"
  test -n "${RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL:-}"       || return 1
  test -n "${RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY:-}"        || return 1
  test -n "${RBRA_TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC:-}" || return 1

  buc_log_args "Build JWT header"
  printf '%s' '{"alg":"RS256","typ":"JWT"}' > "${ZRBGO_JWT_HEADER_FILE}"

  buc_log_args "Calculate timestamps"
  local z_now
  z_now=$(date +%s) || return 1
  local -r z_exp=$((z_now + RBRA_TOKEN_LIFETIME_SEC))

  buc_log_args "Build JWT claims"
  jq -n                                         \
    --arg iss   "${RBRA_CLIENT_EMAIL}"          \
    --arg scope "${RBGC_SCOPE_CLOUD_PLATFORM}"  \
    --arg aud   "${RBGC_OAUTH_TOKEN_URL}"       \
    --argjson iat "${z_now}"                    \
    --argjson exp "${z_exp}"                    \
    '{iss: $iss, scope: $scope, aud: $aud, iat: $iat, exp: $exp}' \
    > "${ZRBGO_JWT_CLAIMS_FILE}" || return 1

  buc_log_args "Encode header and claims"
  local z_header_enc
  z_header_enc=$(zrbgo_base64url_encode_capture "$(<"${ZRBGO_JWT_HEADER_FILE}")") || return 1

  local z_claims_enc
  z_claims_enc=$(zrbgo_base64url_encode_capture "$(<"${ZRBGO_JWT_CLAIMS_FILE}")") || return 1

  buc_log_args "Create unsigned JWT"
  printf '%s' "${z_header_enc}.${z_claims_enc}" > "${ZRBGO_JWT_UNSIGNED_FILE}"

  buc_log_args "Sign with RSA256 (without writing key to disk)"
  # Convert literal \n sequences to real newlines via printf %b and feed via process substitution
  openssl dgst -sha256 \
    -sign <(printf '%b' "${RBRA_PRIVATE_KEY}\n") \
    -out "${ZRBGO_JWT_SIGNATURE_FILE}" \
    "${ZRBGO_JWT_UNSIGNED_FILE}" 2>"${ZRBGO_OPENSSL_STDERR_FILE}" || {
      buc_warn "openssl RSA256 sign failed: $(<"${ZRBGO_OPENSSL_STDERR_FILE}")"
      return 1
    }

  buc_log_args "Base64url encode signature"
  local z_signature
  z_signature=$(rbgo_base64_encode_file_capture "${ZRBGO_JWT_SIGNATURE_FILE}") || {
    buc_warn "openssl signature base64 encode failed"
    return 1
  }
  z_signature="${z_signature//+/-}"
  z_signature="${z_signature//\//_}"
  z_signature="${z_signature//=/}"

  buc_log_args "Return complete JWT"
  printf '%s\n' "${z_header_enc}.${z_claims_enc}.${z_signature}"
}

zrbgo_exchange_jwt_capture() {
  zrbgo_sentinel

  local -r z_jwt="$1"

  local z_attempt=0
  local z_curl_status=0
  while :; do
    z_attempt=$((z_attempt + 1))

    buc_log_args "Exchange JWT for OAuth token (attempt ${z_attempt}/${RBGC_HTTP_TRANSIENT_RETRY_ATTEMPTS})"
    z_curl_status=0
    curl -sS -X POST "${RBGC_OAUTH_TOKEN_URL}"                                        \
      --connect-timeout "${RBCC_CURL_CONNECT_TIMEOUT_SEC}"                           \
      --max-time "${RBCC_CURL_MAX_TIME_SEC}"                                         \
      -H "Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded"                           \
      -d "grant_type=urn:ietf:params:oauth:grant-type:jwt-bearer&assertion=${z_jwt}" \
      > "${ZRBGO_OAUTH_RESPONSE_FILE}" 2>"${ZRBGO_CURL_STDERR_FILE}" || z_curl_status=$?

    test "${z_curl_status}" -eq 0 && break

    buc_warn "OAuth curl exit ${z_curl_status}: $(<"${ZRBGO_CURL_STDERR_FILE}")"
    rbgu_curl_status_is_transient_predicate "${z_curl_status}" || return 1
    test "${z_attempt}" -lt "${RBGC_HTTP_TRANSIENT_RETRY_ATTEMPTS}" || return 1

    buc_step "OAuth token mint: transient curl ${z_curl_status}, retry ${z_attempt}/${RBGC_HTTP_TRANSIENT_RETRY_ATTEMPTS} in ${RBGC_HTTP_TRANSIENT_RETRY_SLEEP_SEC}s"
    sleep "${RBGC_HTTP_TRANSIENT_RETRY_SLEEP_SEC}"
  done

  # Scrubber filters by field NAME, not value. Deliberate best-effort log hygiene:
  # explicitly deletes access_token/refresh_token, then drops any field whose key
  # matches token|secret|key|password (case-insensitive) — catches id_token,
  # client_secret, etc. If the OAuth provider ever returns a new secret-carrying
  # field whose name doesn't match this regex, the scrub would miss it; update
  # the regex here when that happens.
  buc_log_args "Debug: Show the actual response (minus secrets)"
  jq 'del(.access_token, .refresh_token)
      | with_entries(select(.key | test("token|secret|key|password"; "i") | not))' \
    "${ZRBGO_OAUTH_RESPONSE_FILE}" 2>"${ZRBGO_JQ_STDERR_FILE}" | buc_log_pipe || buc_log_args "OAuth response parsing failed"

  buc_log_args "OAuth token exchange completed"

  buc_log_args "Extract access token"
  local z_token
  z_token=$(jq -r '.access_token // empty' "${ZRBGO_OAUTH_RESPONSE_FILE}") || return 1
  test -n "${z_token}" || {
    buc_warn "OAuth response missing access_token; redacted response body follows:"
    jq 'with_entries(select(.key | test("token|secret|key|password"; "i") | not))' \
      "${ZRBGO_OAUTH_RESPONSE_FILE}" 2>"${ZRBGO_JQ_STDERR_FILE}" >&2 \
      || cat "${ZRBGO_OAUTH_RESPONSE_FILE}" >&2
    return 1
  }

  printf '%s\n' "${z_token}"
}

######################################################################
# External Functions (rbgo_*)

rbgo_get_token_capture() {
  zrbgo_sentinel

  local -r z_rbra_file="$1"

  buc_doc_brief "Exchange service account credentials for OAuth2 access token (retries on JWT-propagation race)"
  buc_doc_param "rbra_file" "Path to RBRA credentials file containing RBRA_* variables"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  buc_log_args "Validate RBRA file exists"
  test -f "${z_rbra_file}" || return 1

  local z_attempt=0
  local z_elapsed=0
  local z_delay="${RBGC_SA_KEY_CONSUMER_RETRY_INITIAL_DELAY_SEC}"
  local z_jwt=""
  local z_token=""
  local z_status=0
  local z_err=""
  local z_err_desc=""

  while :; do
    z_attempt=$((z_attempt + 1))

    z_status=0
    z_jwt=$(zrbgo_build_jwt_capture "${z_rbra_file}") || z_status=$?
    test "${z_status}" -eq 0 || return 1

    z_status=0
    z_token=$(zrbgo_exchange_jwt_capture "${z_jwt}") || z_status=$?

    if test "${z_status}" -eq 0 && test -n "${z_token}"; then
      printf '%s\n' "${z_token}"
      return 0
    fi

    # Discriminate failure: only the SA-propagation race shapes retry —
    #   `invalid_grant` + `Invalid JWT Signature.`         (fresh-key propagation lag)
    #   `invalid_grant` + `Invalid grant: account not found` (fresh-SA propagation lag)
    # Any other shape fails fast.
    z_err=$(jq -r '.error // ""'             "${ZRBGO_OAUTH_RESPONSE_FILE}" 2>"${ZRBGO_JQ_STDERR_FILE}") || z_err=""
    z_err_desc=$(jq -r '.error_description // ""' "${ZRBGO_OAUTH_RESPONSE_FILE}" 2>"${ZRBGO_JQ_STDERR_FILE}") || z_err_desc=""

    test "${z_err}" = "invalid_grant" || return 1
    case "${z_err_desc}" in
      "Invalid JWT Signature."|"Invalid grant: account not found") ;;
      *) return 1 ;;
    esac

    cp "${ZRBGO_OAUTH_RESPONSE_FILE}" "${ZRBGO_CONSUMER_RETRY_BODY_FILE}" || return 1

    if test "${z_elapsed}" -ge "${RBGC_SA_KEY_CONSUMER_RETRY_BUDGET_SEC}"; then
      buc_warn "Token mint: SA propagation race timeout after ${z_elapsed}s (${z_attempt} attempts); last body: ${ZRBGO_CONSUMER_RETRY_BODY_FILE}"
      return 1
    fi

    buc_step "Token mint: attempt ${z_attempt} hit SA propagation race (${z_err_desc}) at ${z_elapsed}s, sleep ${z_delay}s"
    sleep "${z_delay}"
    z_elapsed=$((z_elapsed + z_delay))
    z_delay=$((z_delay * 2))
    test "${z_delay}" -le "${RBGC_SA_KEY_CONSUMER_RETRY_MAX_DELAY_SEC}" || z_delay="${RBGC_SA_KEY_CONSUMER_RETRY_MAX_DELAY_SEC}"
  done
}

# eof

1	#!/bin/bash
2	#
3	# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
4	#
5	# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
6	# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
7	# You may obtain a copy of the License at
8	#
9	#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
10	#
11	# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
12	# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
13	# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
14	# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
15	# limitations under the License.
16	#
17	# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
18	#
19	# Recipe Bottle Google IAM - Implementation
20	
21	# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
22	# Operational Invariants (RBGI is single writer; 409 is fatal)
23	#
24	# - Single admin actor: All RBGI operations are executed by a single admin
25	#   identity. There are no concurrent writers in the same project.
26	# - Pristine-state expectation: RBGI init/creation flows assume the project
27	#   is pristine for the resources they manage. If a resource "already exists"
28	#   (HTTP 409), that's treated as state drift or prior manual activity.
29	# - Policy: All HTTP 409 Conflict responses are fatal (buc_die). We do not
30	#   treat 409 as idempotent success anywhere in RBGI.
31	#   If you see a 409, resolve state drift first (destroy/reset), then rerun.
32	# - Note: 409 has two distinct meanings in RBGI operations:
33	#   (a) Resource creation: "already exists" — state drift or prior manual activity.
34	#   (b) setIamPolicy: "ABORTED" — etag mismatch from concurrent policy change.
35	#   Both are fatal under single-writer invariant. Google-internal auto-provisioning
36	#   can trigger (b) outside our control; the 409 surfaces a real concurrency issue.
37	# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
38	
39	set -euo pipefail
40	
41	# Multiple inclusion detection
42	test -z "${ZRBGI_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgi multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
43	ZRBGI_SOURCED=1
44	
45	######################################################################
46	# Internal Functions (zrbgi_*)
47	
48	zrbgi_kindle() {
49	  test -z "${ZRBGI_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgi already kindled"
50	
51	  # Validate dependencies
52	  buv_dir_exists "${BURD_TEMP_DIR}"
53	
54	  # Ensure dependencies are kindled
55	  zrbgc_sentinel
56	  zrbgu_sentinel
57	
58	  # Module prefix for temp files
59	  readonly ZRBGI_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgi_"
60	  readonly ZRBGI_EMPTY_JSON="${ZRBGI_PREFIX}empty.json"
61	  printf '{}' > "${ZRBGI_EMPTY_JSON}"
62	
63	  readonly ZRBGI_VERSION3_BODY="${ZRBGI_PREFIX}version3_body.json"
64	  printf '%s\n' '{"options":{"requestedPolicyVersion":3}}' > "${ZRBGI_VERSION3_BODY}"
65	
66	  # Infix values for IAM operations
67	  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_ROLE="role"
68	  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_ROLE_SET="role_set"
69	  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_REPO_ROLE="repo_role"
70	  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_REPO_ROLE_SET="repo_role_set"
71	  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_SA_IAM_VERIFY="sa_iamverify"
72	  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_BUCKET_IAM="bucket_iam"
73	  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_BUCKET_IAM_SET="bucket_iam_set"
74	  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_SECRET_IAM="secret_iam"
75	  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_SECRET_IAM_SET="secret_iam_set"
76	
77	  readonly ZRBGI_POSTFIX_JSON="_i_resp.json"
78	
79	  readonly ZRBGI_KINDLED=1
80	}
81	
82	zrbgi_sentinel() {
83	  test "${ZRBGI_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgi not kindled - call zrbgi_kindle first"
84	}
85	
86	# Classify an HTTP response against a caller-supplied tolerance list.
87	# Each tolerance is a (code, body-glob) pair passed as two positional args
88	# after the infix and code. An empty body-glob matches any response body
89	# for that code — short-circuits without loading the error message.
90	#
91	# Three propagation classes are encoded as tolerance pairs:
92	#   (400, "*does not exist*") — forward member-visibility lag
93	#   (400, "*is not deleted*") — backward member-visibility lag
94	#   (403, "")                 — caller-recently-empowered (resource-scope cache lag)
95	#
96	# Project-scope sites declare only the two 400 patterns; resource-scope sites
97	# (AR repo, SA, bucket, secret) add the 403 pair. Time-bound on 403 is the
98	# discriminator: real propagation succeeds within budget, real denial waits
99	# the budget and fails cleanly.
100	#
101	# Returns 0 (true) if response matches any tolerance pair, 1 otherwise.
102	zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate() {
103	  local -r z_infix="${1}"
104	  local -r z_code="${2}"
105	  shift 2
106	
107	  local z_err_msg=""
108	  local z_err_loaded=0
109	  local z_tol_code=""
110	  local z_tol_glob=""
111	
112	  while test "$#" -ge 2; do
113	    z_tol_code="${1}"
114	    z_tol_glob="${2}"
115	    shift 2
116	
117	    test "${z_code}" = "${z_tol_code}" || continue
118	
119	    test -n "${z_tol_glob}" || return 0
120	
121	    if test "${z_err_loaded}" = "0"; then
122	      z_err_msg=$(rbgu_error_message_capture "${z_infix}") || z_err_msg=""
123	      z_err_loaded=1
124	    fi
125	
126	    case "${z_err_msg}" in
127	      ${z_tol_glob}) return 0 ;;
128	    esac
129	  done
130	
131	  return 1
132	}
133	
134	######################################################################
135	# External Functions (rbgi_*)
136	
137	# Add a project-scoped IAM role binding with optimistic concurrency and strong read-back.
138	rbgi_add_project_iam_role() {
139	  zrbgi_sentinel
140	
141	  local -r z_token="${1:-}"
142	  local -r z_label="${2:-}"
143	  local -r z_resource="${3:-}"  # resource_base: Base resource URL
144	  local -r z_role="${4:-}"
145	  local -r z_member="${5:-}"
146	  local -r z_parent_infix="${6:-}"
147	
148	  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "Token required"
149	  buc_log_args "Using admin token (value not logged)"
150	
151	  local -r z_resource_path="${z_resource#/}"  # strip leading slash if present
152	  local -r z_base="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/${z_resource_path}"
153	  local -r z_get_url="${z_base}${RBGC_CRM_GET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX}"
154	  local -r z_set_url="${z_base}${RBGC_CRM_SET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX}"
155	
156	  test -n "${z_resource}" || buc_die "resource required"
157	  test -n "${z_role}"     || buc_die "role required"
158	  test -n "${z_member}"   || buc_die "member required"
159	
160	  buc_log_args "${z_label}: add ${z_member} to ${z_role}"
161	
162	  # Propagation retry — project-scope tolerance: forward/backward
163	  # member-visibility (400 patterns). Class C (403 resource-scope cache lag)
164	  # does not apply at project scope.
165	  local -ra z_tolerance=(
166	    "400" "*does not exist*"
167	    "400" "*is not deleted*"
168	  )
169	  local z_prop_delay=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_INITIAL_DELAY_SEC}
170	  local z_prop_elapsed=0
171	  local -r z_prop_deadline=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_DEADLINE_SEC}
172	  local z_prop_attempt=0
173	  local z_prop_succeeded=0
174	
175	  while :; do
176	    z_prop_attempt=$((z_prop_attempt + 1))
177	
178	    buc_log_args "1) GET policy (v3) [attempt ${z_prop_attempt}]"
179	    buc_log_args "GET_POLICY_URL_DEBUG z_resource:${z_resource} z_get_url:${z_get_url}"
180	    local z_get_body="${ZRBGI_PREFIX}${z_parent_infix}_get_body.json"
181	    local z_get_infix="${z_parent_infix}-get-${z_prop_elapsed}s"
182	    printf '%s\n' '{"options":{"requestedPolicyVersion":3}}' > "${z_get_body}"
183	    rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_get_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_get_infix}" "${z_get_body}"
184	
185	    local z_get_code=""
186	    z_get_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_get_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from getIamPolicy"
187	
188	    # Check for propagation error on GET
189	    if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_get_infix}" "${z_get_code}" "${z_tolerance[@]}"; then
190	      buc_log_args "${z_label}: getIamPolicy returned ${z_get_code} (propagation delay)"
191	      test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
192	        || buc_die "${z_label}: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s waiting for member visibility"
193	      buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
194	      sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
195	      z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
196	      z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
197	      test "${z_prop_delay}" -le "${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}" || z_prop_delay=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}
198	      continue
199	    fi
200	
201	    # Not a propagation error on GET — require success
202	    rbgu_http_require_ok "${z_label} (get policy)" "${z_get_infix}"
203	
204	    buc_log_args 'Extract etag; require non-empty'
205	    local z_etag=""
206	    z_etag=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_get_infix}" ".etag") || buc_die "Missing etag"
207	    test -n "${z_etag}" || buc_die "Empty etag"
208	
209	    buc_log_args "Using etag ${z_etag}"
210	
211	    buc_log_args '2) Build new policy JSON in temp (bindings unique; version=3; keep etag)'
212	    local z_new_policy_json=""
213	    z_new_policy_json=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "${z_get_infix}" "${z_role}" "${z_member}" "${z_etag}") \
214	      || buc_die "Failed to compose policy JSON"
215	
216	    local z_set_body="${ZRBGI_PREFIX}${z_parent_infix}_set_body.json"
217	    printf '{"policy":%s}\n' "${z_new_policy_json}" > "${z_set_body}"
218	
219	    buc_log_args '3) setIamPolicy (fatal on 409 — etag mismatch)'
220	    local z_set_elapsed=0
221	    local z_set_infix=""
222	    local z_set_succeeded=0
223	    while :; do
224	      z_set_infix="${z_parent_infix}-set-${z_prop_elapsed}s-${z_set_elapsed}s"
225	      rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_set_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_set_infix}" "${z_set_body}"
226	
227	      local z_code=""
228	      z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_set_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code"
229	
230	      # Check for propagation error on SET — break inner loop to retry outer
231	      if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_set_infix}" "${z_code}" "${z_tolerance[@]}"; then
232	        buc_log_args "${z_label}: setIamPolicy returned ${z_code} (propagation delay)"
233	        break
234	      fi
235	
236	      case "${z_code}" in
237	        200)                 z_set_succeeded=1; break ;;
238	        409)                 buc_die "${z_label}: HTTP 409 ABORTED (etag mismatch — concurrent policy change)" ;;
239	        429|500|502|503|504) buc_log_args "Transient ${z_code} at ${z_set_elapsed}s; retry" ;;
240	        *)                   rbgu_http_require_ok "${z_label} (set policy)" "${z_set_infix}" "" ;;
241	      esac
242	
243	      test "${z_set_elapsed}" -lt "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" || buc_die "${z_label}: timeout setting policy"
244	      sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
245	      z_set_elapsed=$((z_set_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
246	    done
247	
248	    # If setIamPolicy succeeded, break outer propagation loop
249	    test "${z_set_succeeded}" != "1" || { z_prop_succeeded=1; break; }
250	
251	    # setIamPolicy hit propagation error — retry outer loop with fresh getIamPolicy
252	    test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
253	      || buc_die "${z_label}: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s waiting for member visibility"
254	    buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
255	    sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
256	    z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
257	    z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
258	    test "${z_prop_delay}" -le "${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}" || z_prop_delay=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}
259	  done
260	
261	  test "${z_prop_succeeded}" = "1" || buc_die "${z_label}: propagation retry loop exited without success"
262	
263	  # The setIamPolicy 200 is the authoritative grant confirmation: the policy was
264	  # written atomically with this binding. A post-set read-back verify loop was
265	  # removed here. Against a standing depot, repeated divest/invest cycles leave
266	  # same-email `deleted:serviceAccount:...?uid=` tombstones in the policy (accepted
267	  # — re-levy is quota-limited), and the email→uid read reconciliation can lag the
268	  # getIamPolicy read past any bounded poll, producing a false timeout on a grant
269	  # that already succeeded. The read-back never made the grant effective — that
270	  # propagates on GCP's clock regardless and cannot be accelerated by polling — so
271	  # it was non-load-bearing and is gone.
272	  buc_log_args "${z_label}: granted (setIamPolicy 200)"
273	  return 0
274	}

276	rbgi_add_repo_iam_role() {
277	  zrbgi_sentinel
278	
279	  local -r z_token="${1:-}"
280	  local -r z_project_id="${2:-}"

282	  local -r z_location="${4:-}"
283	  local -r z_repository="${5:-}"
284	  local -r z_role="${6:-}"
285	
286	  test -n "${z_token}"         || buc_die "Token required"
287	  test -n "${z_project_id}"    || buc_die "Project ID required"
288	  test -n "${z_account_email}" || buc_die "Service account email required"
289	  test -n "${z_location}"      || buc_die "Location is required"
290	  test -n "${z_repository}"    || buc_die "Repository is required"

297	  local -r z_set_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_resource}:setIamPolicy"
298	
299	  buc_log_args 'Adding repo-scoped IAM role' \
300	               " ${z_role} to ${z_account_email} on ${z_location}/${z_repository}"
301	
302	  # Propagation retry — AR repo is resource-scope: member-visibility 400s
303	  # plus caller-recently-empowered 403 from the resource-scope IAM cache.
304	  local -ra z_tolerance=(
305	    "400" "*does not exist*"
306	    "400" "*is not deleted*"
307	    "403" ""
308	  )
309	  local z_prop_delay=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_INITIAL_DELAY_SEC}
310	  local z_prop_elapsed=0
311	  local -r z_prop_deadline=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_DEADLINE_SEC}
312	  local z_prop_attempt=0
313	
314	  local z_prop_succeeded=0
315	
316	  while :; do
317	    z_prop_attempt=$((z_prop_attempt + 1))
318	    local z_get_infix="${ZRBGI_INFIX_REPO_ROLE}-${z_prop_elapsed}s"
319	
320	    buc_log_args "1) GET repo IAM policy (v3) [attempt ${z_prop_attempt}]"
321	    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_get_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_get_infix}"
322	
323	    local z_get_code
324	    z_get_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_get_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from repo getIamPolicy"
325	
326	    # Check for propagation error on GET

328	      buc_log_args "Repo getIamPolicy returned ${z_get_code} (propagation delay)"
329	      test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
330	        || buc_die "Repo IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
331	      buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
332	      sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
333	      z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
334	      z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
335	      test "${z_prop_delay}" -le "${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}" || z_prop_delay=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}
336	      continue
337	    fi
338	
339	    # Not a propagation error on GET — require success
340	    rbgu_http_require_ok "Get repo IAM policy" "${z_get_infix}"
341	
342	    buc_log_args 'Extract etag; require non-empty'
343	    local z_etag=""
344	    z_etag=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_get_infix}" ".etag") || buc_die "Missing repo etag"
345	    test -n "${z_etag}" || buc_die "Empty repo etag"
346	
347	    buc_log_args "Using etag ${z_etag}"
348	
349	    buc_log_args '2) Build new policy JSON (bindings unique; version=3; keep etag)'
350	    local z_updated_policy_json=""
351	    z_updated_policy_json=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "${z_get_infix}" \
352	      "${z_role}" "serviceAccount:${z_account_email}" "${z_etag}") \
353	      || buc_die "Failed to update policy JSON"
354	
355	    buc_log_args '3) setIamPolicy (fatal on 409 — etag mismatch)'
356	    local z_repo_set_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgi_repo_set_policy_body.json"
357	    printf '{"policy":%s}\n' "${z_updated_policy_json}" > "${z_repo_set_body}" \
358	      || buc_die "Failed to build repo setIamPolicy body"
359	
360	    local z_set_elapsed=0
361	    local z_set_infix=""
362	    local z_set_succeeded=0
363	    while :; do
364	      z_set_infix="${ZRBGI_INFIX_REPO_ROLE_SET}-${z_prop_elapsed}s-${z_set_elapsed}s"
365	      rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_set_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_set_infix}" "${z_repo_set_body}"
366	
367	      local z_set_code=""
368	      z_set_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_set_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from setIamPolicy"
369	
370	      # Check for propagation error on SET — break inner loop to retry outer
371	      if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_set_infix}" "${z_set_code}" "${z_tolerance[@]}"; then
372	        buc_log_args "Repo setIamPolicy returned ${z_set_code} (propagation delay)"
373	        break
374	      fi
375	
376	      case "${z_set_code}" in
377	        200)                 z_set_succeeded=1; break ;;
378	        409)                 buc_die "Repo IAM: HTTP 409 ABORTED (etag mismatch — concurrent policy change)" ;;
379	        429|500|502|503|504) buc_log_args "Transient ${z_set_code} at ${z_set_elapsed}s; retry" ;;
380	        *)                   rbgu_http_require_ok "Set repo IAM policy" "${z_set_infix}" "" ;;
381	      esac
382	
383	      test "${z_set_elapsed}" -lt "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" || buc_die "Repo IAM: timeout setting policy"
384	      sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
385	      z_set_elapsed=$((z_set_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
386	    done
387	
388	    # If setIamPolicy succeeded, break outer propagation loop
389	    test "${z_set_succeeded}" != "1" || { z_prop_succeeded=1; break; }
390	
391	    # setIamPolicy hit propagation error — retry outer loop with fresh getIamPolicy
392	    test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
393	      || buc_die "Repo IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
394	    buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
395	    sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
396	    z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
397	    z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
398	    test "${z_prop_delay}" -le "${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}" || z_prop_delay=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}
399	  done
400	
401	  test "${z_prop_succeeded}" = "1" || buc_die "Repo IAM: propagation retry loop exited without success"
402

406	rbgi_add_sa_iam_role() {
407	  zrbgi_sentinel
408	
409	  local -r z_token="${1:-}"

412	  local -r z_role="${4:-}"
413

415	
416	  buc_log_args "Using admin token (value not logged)"
417	  buc_log_args "Granting ${z_role} on SA ${z_target_sa_email} to ${z_member_email}"
418	
419	  # Caller must have already primed Cloud Build if this is the runtime SA.
420	  # We do a hard existence check and crash if not accessible.

422	  buc_log_args 'Verify target SA exists'
423	  local z_target_encoded

432	  test "${z_verify_code}" = "200" || \
433	    buc_die "Target service account not accessible: ${z_target_sa_email} (HTTP ${z_verify_code})"
434	
435	  local -r z_sa_resource="${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/-/serviceAccounts/${z_target_encoded}"
436	
437	  # Propagation retry — SA is resource-scope: member-visibility 400s plus
438	  # caller-recently-empowered 403 from the resource-scope IAM cache.
439	  local -ra z_tolerance=(
440	    "400" "*does not exist*"
441	    "400" "*is not deleted*"
442	    "403" ""
443	  )
444	  local z_prop_delay=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_INITIAL_DELAY_SEC}
445	  local z_prop_elapsed=0
446	  local -r z_prop_deadline=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_DEADLINE_SEC}
447	  local z_prop_attempt=0
448	
449	  local z_prop_succeeded=0
450	
451	  while :; do
452	    z_prop_attempt=$((z_prop_attempt + 1))
453	    local z_get_infix="${ZRBGI_INFIX_ROLE}-${z_prop_elapsed}s"
454	
455	    buc_log_args "1) GET SA IAM policy (v3) [attempt ${z_prop_attempt}]"
456	    rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_sa_resource}:getIamPolicy" "${z_token}" \
457	      "${z_get_infix}" "${ZRBGI_VERSION3_BODY}"
458	
459	    local z_code
460	    z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_get_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from SA getIamPolicy"
461	
462	    # Check for propagation error on GET
463	    if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_get_infix}" "${z_code}" "${z_tolerance[@]}"; then
464	      buc_log_args "SA getIamPolicy returned ${z_code} (propagation delay)"
465	      test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
466	        || buc_die "SA IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
467	      buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
468	      sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
469	      z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
470	      z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
471	      test "${z_prop_delay}" -le "${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}" || z_prop_delay=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}
472	      continue
473	    fi
474	
475	    # Not a propagation error on GET — require success
476	    rbgu_http_require_ok "Get SA IAM policy" "${z_get_infix}"
477	
478	    buc_log_args 'Extract etag; require non-empty'
479	    local z_etag=""
480	    z_etag=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_get_infix}" ".etag") || buc_die "Missing SA etag"
481	    test -n "${z_etag}" || buc_die "Empty SA etag"
482	
483	    buc_log_args "Using etag ${z_etag}"
484	
485	    buc_log_args '2) Build new policy JSON (bindings unique; version=3; keep etag)'
486	    local z_updated_policy_json=""
487	    z_updated_policy_json=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "${z_get_infix}" \
488	      "${z_role}" "serviceAccount:${z_member_email}" "${z_etag}") \
489	      || buc_die "Failed to update SA IAM policy"
490	
491	    buc_log_args '3) setIamPolicy (fatal on 409 — etag mismatch)'
492	    local z_set_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgi_sa_set_policy_body.json"
493	    printf '{"policy":%s}\n' "${z_updated_policy_json}" > "${z_set_body}" \
494	      || buc_die "Failed to build SA setIamPolicy body"
495	
496	    local z_set_elapsed=0
497	    local z_set_infix=""
498	    local z_set_succeeded=0
499	    while :; do
500	      z_set_infix="${ZRBGI_INFIX_ROLE_SET}-${z_prop_elapsed}s-${z_set_elapsed}s"
501	      rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_sa_resource}:setIamPolicy" "${z_token}" \
502	        "${z_set_infix}" "${z_set_body}"
503	
504	      local z_set_code=""
505	      z_set_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_set_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from setIamPolicy"
506	
507	      # Check for propagation error on SET — break inner loop to retry outer

509	        buc_log_args "SA setIamPolicy returned ${z_set_code} (propagation delay)"
510	        break
511	      fi
512	
513	      case "${z_set_code}" in
514	        200)                 z_set_succeeded=1; break ;;
515	        409)                 buc_die "SA IAM: HTTP 409 ABORTED (etag mismatch — concurrent policy change)" ;;
516	        429|500|502|503|504) buc_log_args "Transient ${z_set_code} at ${z_set_elapsed}s; retry" ;;
517	        *)                   rbgu_http_require_ok "Set SA IAM policy" "${z_set_infix}" "" ;;
518	      esac
519	
520	      test "${z_set_elapsed}" -lt "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" || buc_die "SA IAM: timeout setting policy"
521	      sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
522	      z_set_elapsed=$((z_set_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
523	    done
524	
525	    # If setIamPolicy succeeded, break outer propagation loop
526	    test "${z_set_succeeded}" != "1" || { z_prop_succeeded=1; break; }
527	
528	    # setIamPolicy hit propagation error — retry outer loop with fresh getIamPolicy
529	    test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
530	      || buc_die "SA IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
531	    buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
532	    sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
533	    z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
534	    z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
535	    test "${z_prop_delay}" -le "${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}" || z_prop_delay=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}
536	  done
537	
538	  test "${z_prop_succeeded}" = "1" || buc_die "SA IAM: propagation retry loop exited without success"
539	
540	  buc_log_args 'Successfully granted SA role' "${z_role}"
541	}

543	rbgi_add_bucket_iam_role() {
544	  zrbgi_sentinel
545

557

560	  local -ra z_tolerance=(
561	    "400" "*does not exist*"
562	    "400" "*is not deleted*"
563	    "403" ""
564	  )

574	    local z_get_infix="${ZRBGI_INFIX_BUCKET_IAM}-${z_prop_elapsed}s"
575

577	    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_iam_url}?optionsRequestedPolicyVersion=3" "${z_token}" "${z_get_infix}"
578	
579	    local z_code

582	    # Check for propagation error on GET

586	        || buc_die "Bucket IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
587	      buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
588	      sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
589	      z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
590	      z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
591	      test "${z_prop_delay}" -le "${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}" || z_prop_delay=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}
592	      continue
593	    fi
594	
595	    # Not a propagation error on GET — require success
596	    rbgu_http_require_ok "Get bucket IAM policy" "${z_get_infix}"
597	
598	    buc_log_args 'Extract etag; require non-empty'
599	    local z_etag=""
600	    z_etag=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_get_infix}" ".etag") || buc_die "Missing bucket etag"
601	    test -n "${z_etag}" || buc_die "Empty bucket etag"
602	
603	    buc_log_args "Using etag ${z_etag}"
604	
605	    buc_log_args '2) Build new policy JSON (bindings unique; keep etag)'
606	    local z_updated_policy_json=""
607	    z_updated_policy_json=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "${z_get_infix}" \
608	      "${z_role}" "serviceAccount:${z_account_email}" "${z_etag}") \
609	      || buc_die "Failed to update bucket IAM policy"
610	
611	    buc_log_args '3) setIamPolicy (fatal on 412 — etag mismatch; Storage uses 412 not 409)'
612	    local z_bucket_set_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgi_bucket_set_policy_body.json"
613	    printf '%s\n' "${z_updated_policy_json}" > "${z_bucket_set_body}" \
614	      || buc_die "Failed to write bucket policy body"
615	
616	    local z_set_elapsed=0
617	    local z_set_infix=""
618	    local z_set_succeeded=0
619	    while :; do
620	      z_set_infix="${ZRBGI_INFIX_BUCKET_IAM_SET}-${z_prop_elapsed}s-${z_set_elapsed}s"
621	      rbgu_http_json "PUT" "${z_iam_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_set_infix}" "${z_bucket_set_body}"
622	
623	      local z_set_code=""
624	      z_set_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_set_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from setIamPolicy"
625	
626	      # Check for propagation error on SET — break inner loop to retry outer
627	      if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_set_infix}" "${z_set_code}" "${z_tolerance[@]}"; then
628	        buc_log_args "Bucket setIamPolicy returned ${z_set_code} (propagation delay)"
629	        break
630	      fi
631	
632	      case "${z_set_code}" in
633	        200)                 z_set_succeeded=1; break ;;
634	        412)                 buc_die "Bucket IAM: HTTP 412 Precondition Failed (etag mismatch)" ;;
635	        409)                 buc_die "Bucket IAM: HTTP 409 ABORTED (defensive — unexpected for Storage)" ;;
636	        429|500|502|503|504) buc_log_args "Transient ${z_set_code} at ${z_set_elapsed}s; retry" ;;
637	        *)                   rbgu_http_require_ok "Set bucket IAM policy" "${z_set_infix}" "" ;;
638	      esac
639	
640	      test "${z_set_elapsed}" -lt "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" || buc_die "Bucket IAM: timeout setting policy"
641	      sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
642	      z_set_elapsed=$((z_set_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
643	    done
644	
645	    # If setIamPolicy succeeded, break outer propagation loop
646	    test "${z_set_succeeded}" != "1" || { z_prop_succeeded=1; break; }
647	
648	    # setIamPolicy hit propagation error — retry outer loop with fresh getIamPolicy
649	    test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
650	      || buc_die "Bucket IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
651	    buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
652	    sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
653	    z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
654	    z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
655	    test "${z_prop_delay}" -le "${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}" || z_prop_delay=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}
656	  done
657	
658	  test "${z_prop_succeeded}" = "1" || buc_die "Bucket IAM: propagation retry loop exited without success"
659	
660	  buc_log_args "Successfully added bucket role ${z_role}"
661	}
662	
663	# Grant an IAM role binding on a Secret Manager secret with optimistic concurrency and propagation retry.
664	rbgi_grant_secret_iam() {
665	  zrbgi_sentinel
666	
667	  local -r z_token="${1:-}"
668	  local -r z_secret_resource_path="${2:-}"
669	  local -r z_member="${3:-}"
670	  local -r z_role="${4:-}"
671	  local -r z_parent_infix="${5:-}"
672	
673	  test -n "${z_token}"                || buc_die "Token required"
674	  test -n "${z_secret_resource_path}" || buc_die "Secret resource path required"
675	  test -n "${z_member}"               || buc_die "Member required"
676	  test -n "${z_role}"                 || buc_die "Role required"
677	  test -n "${z_parent_infix}"         || buc_die "Parent infix required"
678	
679	  buc_log_args "Using admin token (value not logged)"
680	  buc_log_args "Granting ${z_role} on secret ${z_secret_resource_path} to ${z_member}"
681	
682	  local -r z_get_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_SECRETMANAGER}${RBGC_SECRETMANAGER_V1}/${z_secret_resource_path}:getIamPolicy?options.requestedPolicyVersion=3"
683	  local -r z_set_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_SECRETMANAGER}${RBGC_SECRETMANAGER_V1}/${z_secret_resource_path}:setIamPolicy"
684	
685	  # Propagation retry — secret is resource-scope: member-visibility 400s plus
686	  # caller-recently-empowered 403 from the resource-scope IAM cache.
687	  local -ra z_tolerance=(
688	    "400" "*does not exist*"
689	    "400" "*is not deleted*"
690	    "403" ""
691	  )
692	  local z_prop_delay=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_INITIAL_DELAY_SEC}
693	  local z_prop_elapsed=0
694	  local -r z_prop_deadline=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_DEADLINE_SEC}
695	  local z_prop_attempt=0
696	
697	  local z_prop_succeeded=0
698	
699	  while :; do
700	    z_prop_attempt=$((z_prop_attempt + 1))
701	    local z_get_infix="${z_parent_infix}-get-${z_prop_elapsed}s"
702	
703	    buc_log_args "1) GET secret IAM policy (v3) [attempt ${z_prop_attempt}]"
704	    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_get_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_get_infix}"
705	
706	    local z_get_code
707	    z_get_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_get_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from secret getIamPolicy"
708	
709	    # Check for propagation error on GET
710	    if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_get_infix}" "${z_get_code}" "${z_tolerance[@]}"; then
711	      buc_log_args "Secret getIamPolicy returned ${z_get_code} (propagation delay)"
712	      test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
713	        || buc_die "Secret IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
714	      buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
715	      sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
716	      z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
717	      z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
718	      test "${z_prop_delay}" -le "${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}" || z_prop_delay=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}
719	      continue
720	    fi
721	
722	    # Not a propagation error on GET — require success
723	    rbgu_http_require_ok "Get secret IAM policy" "${z_get_infix}"
724	
725	    buc_log_args 'Extract etag; require non-empty'
726	    local z_etag=""
727	    z_etag=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_get_infix}" ".etag") || buc_die "Missing secret etag"
728	    test -n "${z_etag}" || buc_die "Empty secret etag"
729	
730	    buc_log_args "Using etag ${z_etag}"
731	
732	    buc_log_args '2) Build new policy JSON (bindings unique; version=3; keep etag)'
733	    local z_updated_policy_json=""
734	    z_updated_policy_json=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "${z_get_infix}" \
735	      "${z_role}" "${z_member}" "${z_etag}") \
736	      || buc_die "Failed to update secret IAM policy"
737	
738	    buc_log_args '3) setIamPolicy (fatal on 409 — etag mismatch)'
739	    local z_set_body="${ZRBGI_PREFIX}${z_parent_infix}_set_body.json"
740	    printf '{"policy":%s}\n' "${z_updated_policy_json}" > "${z_set_body}" \
741	      || buc_die "Failed to build secret setIamPolicy body"
742	
743	    local z_set_elapsed=0
744	    local z_set_infix=""
745	    local z_set_succeeded=0
746	    while :; do
747	      z_set_infix="${z_parent_infix}-set-${z_prop_elapsed}s-${z_set_elapsed}s"
748	      rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_set_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_set_infix}" "${z_set_body}"
749	
750	      local z_set_code=""
751	      z_set_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_set_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from setIamPolicy"
752	
753	      # Check for propagation error on SET — break inner loop to retry outer
754	      if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_set_infix}" "${z_set_code}" "${z_tolerance[@]}"; then
755	        buc_log_args "Secret setIamPolicy returned ${z_set_code} (propagation delay)"
756	        break
757	      fi
758	
759	      case "${z_set_code}" in
760	        200)                 z_set_succeeded=1; break ;;
761	        409)                 buc_die "Secret IAM: HTTP 409 ABORTED (etag mismatch — concurrent policy change)" ;;
762	        429|500|502|503|504) buc_log_args "Transient ${z_set_code} at ${z_set_elapsed}s; retry" ;;
763	        *)                   rbgu_http_require_ok "Set secret IAM policy" "${z_set_infix}" "" ;;
764	      esac
765	
766	      test "${z_set_elapsed}" -lt "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" || buc_die "Secret IAM: timeout setting policy"
767	      sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
768	      z_set_elapsed=$((z_set_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
769	    done
770	
771	    # If setIamPolicy succeeded, break outer propagation loop
772	    test "${z_set_succeeded}" != "1" || { z_prop_succeeded=1; break; }
773	
774	    # setIamPolicy hit propagation error — retry outer loop with fresh getIamPolicy
775	    test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
776	      || buc_die "Secret IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
777	    buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
778	    sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
779	    z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
780	    z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
781	    test "${z_prop_delay}" -le "${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}" || z_prop_delay=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}
782	  done
783	
784	  test "${z_prop_succeeded}" = "1" || buc_die "Secret IAM: propagation retry loop exited without success"
785	
786	  buc_log_args "Successfully granted secret role ${z_role}"
787	}
788	
789	# eof
790

#!/bin/bash
#
# Copyright 2025 Scale Invariant, Inc.
#
# Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License");
# you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
# You may obtain a copy of the License at
#
#     http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
#
# Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
# distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
# WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
# See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
# limitations under the License.
#
# Author: Brad Hyslop <bhyslop@scaleinvariant.org>
#
# Recipe Bottle Google IAM - Implementation

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Operational Invariants (RBGI is single writer; 409 is fatal)
#
# - Single admin actor: All RBGI operations are executed by a single admin
#   identity. There are no concurrent writers in the same project.
# - Pristine-state expectation: RBGI init/creation flows assume the project
#   is pristine for the resources they manage. If a resource "already exists"
#   (HTTP 409), that's treated as state drift or prior manual activity.
# - Policy: All HTTP 409 Conflict responses are fatal (buc_die). We do not
#   treat 409 as idempotent success anywhere in RBGI.
#   If you see a 409, resolve state drift first (destroy/reset), then rerun.
# - Note: 409 has two distinct meanings in RBGI operations:
#   (a) Resource creation: "already exists" — state drift or prior manual activity.
#   (b) setIamPolicy: "ABORTED" — etag mismatch from concurrent policy change.
#   Both are fatal under single-writer invariant. Google-internal auto-provisioning
#   can trigger (b) outside our control; the 409 surfaces a real concurrency issue.
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------

set -euo pipefail

# Multiple inclusion detection
test -z "${ZRBGI_SOURCED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgi multiply sourced - check sourcing hierarchy"
ZRBGI_SOURCED=1

######################################################################
# Internal Functions (zrbgi_*)

zrbgi_kindle() {
  test -z "${ZRBGI_KINDLED:-}" || buc_die "Module rbgi already kindled"

  # Validate dependencies
  buv_dir_exists "${BURD_TEMP_DIR}"

  # Ensure dependencies are kindled
  zrbgc_sentinel
  zrbgu_sentinel

  # Module prefix for temp files
  readonly ZRBGI_PREFIX="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgi_"
  readonly ZRBGI_EMPTY_JSON="${ZRBGI_PREFIX}empty.json"
  printf '{}' > "${ZRBGI_EMPTY_JSON}"

  readonly ZRBGI_VERSION3_BODY="${ZRBGI_PREFIX}version3_body.json"
  printf '%s\n' '{"options":{"requestedPolicyVersion":3}}' > "${ZRBGI_VERSION3_BODY}"

  # Infix values for IAM operations
  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_ROLE="role"
  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_ROLE_SET="role_set"
  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_REPO_ROLE="repo_role"
  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_REPO_ROLE_SET="repo_role_set"
  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_SA_IAM_VERIFY="sa_iamverify"
  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_BUCKET_IAM="bucket_iam"
  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_BUCKET_IAM_SET="bucket_iam_set"
  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_SECRET_IAM="secret_iam"
  readonly ZRBGI_INFIX_SECRET_IAM_SET="secret_iam_set"

  readonly ZRBGI_POSTFIX_JSON="_i_resp.json"

  readonly ZRBGI_KINDLED=1
}

zrbgi_sentinel() {
  test "${ZRBGI_KINDLED:-}" = "1" || buc_die "Module rbgi not kindled - call zrbgi_kindle first"
}

# Classify an HTTP response against a caller-supplied tolerance list.
# Each tolerance is a (code, body-glob) pair passed as two positional args
# after the infix and code. An empty body-glob matches any response body
# for that code — short-circuits without loading the error message.
#
# Three propagation classes are encoded as tolerance pairs:
#   (400, "*does not exist*") — forward member-visibility lag
#   (400, "*is not deleted*") — backward member-visibility lag
#   (403, "")                 — caller-recently-empowered (resource-scope cache lag)
#
# Project-scope sites declare only the two 400 patterns; resource-scope sites
# (AR repo, SA, bucket, secret) add the 403 pair. Time-bound on 403 is the
# discriminator: real propagation succeeds within budget, real denial waits
# the budget and fails cleanly.
#
# Returns 0 (true) if response matches any tolerance pair, 1 otherwise.
zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate() {
  local -r z_infix="${1}"
  local -r z_code="${2}"
  shift 2

  local z_err_msg=""
  local z_err_loaded=0
  local z_tol_code=""
  local z_tol_glob=""

  while test "$#" -ge 2; do
    z_tol_code="${1}"
    z_tol_glob="${2}"
    shift 2

    test "${z_code}" = "${z_tol_code}" || continue

    test -n "${z_tol_glob}" || return 0

    if test "${z_err_loaded}" = "0"; then
      z_err_msg=$(rbgu_error_message_capture "${z_infix}") || z_err_msg=""
      z_err_loaded=1
    fi

    case "${z_err_msg}" in
      ${z_tol_glob}) return 0 ;;
    esac
  done

  return 1
}

######################################################################
# External Functions (rbgi_*)

# Add a project-scoped IAM role binding with optimistic concurrency and strong read-back.
rbgi_add_project_iam_role() {
  zrbgi_sentinel

  local -r z_token="${1:-}"
  local -r z_label="${2:-}"
  local -r z_resource="${3:-}"  # resource_base: Base resource URL
  local -r z_role="${4:-}"
  local -r z_member="${5:-}"
  local -r z_parent_infix="${6:-}"

  test -n "${z_token}" || buc_die "Token required"
  buc_log_args "Using admin token (value not logged)"

  local -r z_resource_path="${z_resource#/}"  # strip leading slash if present
  local -r z_base="${RBGC_API_ROOT_CRM}${RBGC_CRM_V1}/${z_resource_path}"
  local -r z_get_url="${z_base}${RBGC_CRM_GET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX}"
  local -r z_set_url="${z_base}${RBGC_CRM_SET_IAM_POLICY_SUFFIX}"

  test -n "${z_resource}" || buc_die "resource required"
  test -n "${z_role}"     || buc_die "role required"
  test -n "${z_member}"   || buc_die "member required"

  buc_log_args "${z_label}: add ${z_member} to ${z_role}"

  # Propagation retry — project-scope tolerance: forward/backward
  # member-visibility (400 patterns). Class C (403 resource-scope cache lag)
  # does not apply at project scope.
  local -ra z_tolerance=(
    "400" "*does not exist*"
    "400" "*is not deleted*"
  )
  local z_prop_delay=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_INITIAL_DELAY_SEC}
  local z_prop_elapsed=0
  local -r z_prop_deadline=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_DEADLINE_SEC}
  local z_prop_attempt=0
  local z_prop_succeeded=0

  while :; do
    z_prop_attempt=$((z_prop_attempt + 1))

    buc_log_args "1) GET policy (v3) [attempt ${z_prop_attempt}]"
    buc_log_args "GET_POLICY_URL_DEBUG z_resource:${z_resource} z_get_url:${z_get_url}"
    local z_get_body="${ZRBGI_PREFIX}${z_parent_infix}_get_body.json"
    local z_get_infix="${z_parent_infix}-get-${z_prop_elapsed}s"
    printf '%s\n' '{"options":{"requestedPolicyVersion":3}}' > "${z_get_body}"
    rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_get_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_get_infix}" "${z_get_body}"

    local z_get_code=""
    z_get_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_get_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from getIamPolicy"

    # Check for propagation error on GET
    if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_get_infix}" "${z_get_code}" "${z_tolerance[@]}"; then
      buc_log_args "${z_label}: getIamPolicy returned ${z_get_code} (propagation delay)"
      test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
        || buc_die "${z_label}: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s waiting for member visibility"
      buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
      sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
      z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
      z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
      test "${z_prop_delay}" -le "${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}" || z_prop_delay=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}
      continue
    fi

    # Not a propagation error on GET — require success
    rbgu_http_require_ok "${z_label} (get policy)" "${z_get_infix}"

    buc_log_args 'Extract etag; require non-empty'
    local z_etag=""
    z_etag=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_get_infix}" ".etag") || buc_die "Missing etag"
    test -n "${z_etag}" || buc_die "Empty etag"

    buc_log_args "Using etag ${z_etag}"

    buc_log_args '2) Build new policy JSON in temp (bindings unique; version=3; keep etag)'
    local z_new_policy_json=""
    z_new_policy_json=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "${z_get_infix}" "${z_role}" "${z_member}" "${z_etag}") \
      || buc_die "Failed to compose policy JSON"

    local z_set_body="${ZRBGI_PREFIX}${z_parent_infix}_set_body.json"
    printf '{"policy":%s}\n' "${z_new_policy_json}" > "${z_set_body}"

    buc_log_args '3) setIamPolicy (fatal on 409 — etag mismatch)'
    local z_set_elapsed=0
    local z_set_infix=""
    local z_set_succeeded=0
    while :; do
      z_set_infix="${z_parent_infix}-set-${z_prop_elapsed}s-${z_set_elapsed}s"
      rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_set_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_set_infix}" "${z_set_body}"

      local z_code=""
      z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_set_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code"

      # Check for propagation error on SET — break inner loop to retry outer
      if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_set_infix}" "${z_code}" "${z_tolerance[@]}"; then
        buc_log_args "${z_label}: setIamPolicy returned ${z_code} (propagation delay)"
        break
      fi

      case "${z_code}" in
        200)                 z_set_succeeded=1; break ;;
        409)                 buc_die "${z_label}: HTTP 409 ABORTED (etag mismatch — concurrent policy change)" ;;
        429|500|502|503|504) buc_log_args "Transient ${z_code} at ${z_set_elapsed}s; retry" ;;
        *)                   rbgu_http_require_ok "${z_label} (set policy)" "${z_set_infix}" "" ;;
      esac

      test "${z_set_elapsed}" -lt "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" || buc_die "${z_label}: timeout setting policy"
      sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
      z_set_elapsed=$((z_set_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
    done

    # If setIamPolicy succeeded, break outer propagation loop
    test "${z_set_succeeded}" != "1" || { z_prop_succeeded=1; break; }

    # setIamPolicy hit propagation error — retry outer loop with fresh getIamPolicy
    test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
      || buc_die "${z_label}: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s waiting for member visibility"
    buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
    sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
    z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
    z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
    test "${z_prop_delay}" -le "${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}" || z_prop_delay=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}
  done

  test "${z_prop_succeeded}" = "1" || buc_die "${z_label}: propagation retry loop exited without success"

  # The setIamPolicy 200 is the authoritative grant confirmation: the policy was
  # written atomically with this binding. A post-set read-back verify loop was
  # removed here. Against a standing depot, repeated divest/invest cycles leave
  # same-email `deleted:serviceAccount:...?uid=` tombstones in the policy (accepted
  # — re-levy is quota-limited), and the email→uid read reconciliation can lag the
  # getIamPolicy read past any bounded poll, producing a false timeout on a grant
  # that already succeeded. The read-back never made the grant effective — that
  # propagates on GCP's clock regardless and cannot be accelerated by polling — so
  # it was non-load-bearing and is gone.
  buc_log_args "${z_label}: granted (setIamPolicy 200)"
  return 0
}

rbgi_add_repo_iam_role() {
  zrbgi_sentinel

  local -r z_token="${1:-}"
  local -r z_project_id="${2:-}"
  local -r z_account_email="${3:-}"
  local -r z_location="${4:-}"
  local -r z_repository="${5:-}"
  local -r z_role="${6:-}"

  test -n "${z_token}"         || buc_die "Token required"
  test -n "${z_project_id}"    || buc_die "Project ID required"
  test -n "${z_account_email}" || buc_die "Service account email required"
  test -n "${z_location}"      || buc_die "Location is required"
  test -n "${z_repository}"    || buc_die "Repository is required"
  test -n "${z_role}"          || buc_die "Role is required"

  buc_log_args "Using admin token (value not logged)"

  local -r z_resource="projects/${z_project_id}/locations/${z_location}/repositories/${z_repository}"
  local -r z_get_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_resource}:getIamPolicy?options.requestedPolicyVersion=3"
  local -r z_set_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_ARTIFACTREGISTRY}${RBGC_ARTIFACTREGISTRY_V1}/${z_resource}:setIamPolicy"

  buc_log_args 'Adding repo-scoped IAM role' \
               " ${z_role} to ${z_account_email} on ${z_location}/${z_repository}"

  # Propagation retry — AR repo is resource-scope: member-visibility 400s
  # plus caller-recently-empowered 403 from the resource-scope IAM cache.
  local -ra z_tolerance=(
    "400" "*does not exist*"
    "400" "*is not deleted*"
    "403" ""
  )
  local z_prop_delay=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_INITIAL_DELAY_SEC}
  local z_prop_elapsed=0
  local -r z_prop_deadline=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_DEADLINE_SEC}
  local z_prop_attempt=0

  local z_prop_succeeded=0

  while :; do
    z_prop_attempt=$((z_prop_attempt + 1))
    local z_get_infix="${ZRBGI_INFIX_REPO_ROLE}-${z_prop_elapsed}s"

    buc_log_args "1) GET repo IAM policy (v3) [attempt ${z_prop_attempt}]"
    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${z_get_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_get_infix}"

    local z_get_code
    z_get_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_get_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from repo getIamPolicy"

    # Check for propagation error on GET
    if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_get_infix}" "${z_get_code}" "${z_tolerance[@]}"; then
      buc_log_args "Repo getIamPolicy returned ${z_get_code} (propagation delay)"
      test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
        || buc_die "Repo IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
      buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
      sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
      z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
      z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
      test "${z_prop_delay}" -le "${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}" || z_prop_delay=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}
      continue
    fi

    # Not a propagation error on GET — require success
    rbgu_http_require_ok "Get repo IAM policy" "${z_get_infix}"

    buc_log_args 'Extract etag; require non-empty'
    local z_etag=""
    z_etag=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_get_infix}" ".etag") || buc_die "Missing repo etag"
    test -n "${z_etag}" || buc_die "Empty repo etag"

    buc_log_args "Using etag ${z_etag}"

    buc_log_args '2) Build new policy JSON (bindings unique; version=3; keep etag)'
    local z_updated_policy_json=""
    z_updated_policy_json=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "${z_get_infix}" \
      "${z_role}" "serviceAccount:${z_account_email}" "${z_etag}") \
      || buc_die "Failed to update policy JSON"

    buc_log_args '3) setIamPolicy (fatal on 409 — etag mismatch)'
    local z_repo_set_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgi_repo_set_policy_body.json"
    printf '{"policy":%s}\n' "${z_updated_policy_json}" > "${z_repo_set_body}" \
      || buc_die "Failed to build repo setIamPolicy body"

    local z_set_elapsed=0
    local z_set_infix=""
    local z_set_succeeded=0
    while :; do
      z_set_infix="${ZRBGI_INFIX_REPO_ROLE_SET}-${z_prop_elapsed}s-${z_set_elapsed}s"
      rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_set_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_set_infix}" "${z_repo_set_body}"

      local z_set_code=""
      z_set_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_set_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from setIamPolicy"

      # Check for propagation error on SET — break inner loop to retry outer
      if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_set_infix}" "${z_set_code}" "${z_tolerance[@]}"; then
        buc_log_args "Repo setIamPolicy returned ${z_set_code} (propagation delay)"
        break
      fi

      case "${z_set_code}" in
        200)                 z_set_succeeded=1; break ;;
        409)                 buc_die "Repo IAM: HTTP 409 ABORTED (etag mismatch — concurrent policy change)" ;;
        429|500|502|503|504) buc_log_args "Transient ${z_set_code} at ${z_set_elapsed}s; retry" ;;
        *)                   rbgu_http_require_ok "Set repo IAM policy" "${z_set_infix}" "" ;;
      esac

      test "${z_set_elapsed}" -lt "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" || buc_die "Repo IAM: timeout setting policy"
      sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
      z_set_elapsed=$((z_set_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
    done

    # If setIamPolicy succeeded, break outer propagation loop
    test "${z_set_succeeded}" != "1" || { z_prop_succeeded=1; break; }

    # setIamPolicy hit propagation error — retry outer loop with fresh getIamPolicy
    test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
      || buc_die "Repo IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
    buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
    sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
    z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
    z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
    test "${z_prop_delay}" -le "${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}" || z_prop_delay=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}
  done

  test "${z_prop_succeeded}" = "1" || buc_die "Repo IAM: propagation retry loop exited without success"

  buc_log_args 'Successfully added repo-scoped role' "${z_role}"
}

rbgi_add_sa_iam_role() {

  local -r z_token="${1:-}"
  local -r z_target_sa_email="${2:-}"

  # Caller must have already primed Cloud Build if this is the runtime SA.

  buc_log_args 'Verify target SA exists'
  local z_target_encoded

    || buc_die "Failed to encode SA email"

    "${RBGC_API_ROOT_IAM}${RBGC_IAM_V1}/projects/-/serviceAccounts/${z_target_encoded}" \

    "400" "*is not deleted*"
    "403" ""

    local z_code
    z_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_get_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from SA getIamPolicy"

    # Check for propagation error on GET
    if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_get_infix}" "${z_code}" "${z_tolerance[@]}"; then
      buc_log_args "SA getIamPolicy returned ${z_code} (propagation delay)"
      test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \

      buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
      sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
      z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
      z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
      test "${z_prop_delay}" -le "${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}" || z_prop_delay=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}
      continue
    fi

    # Not a propagation error on GET — require success

    buc_log_args 'Extract etag; require non-empty'
    local z_etag=""
    z_etag=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_get_infix}" ".etag") || buc_die "Missing SA etag"
    test -n "${z_etag}" || buc_die "Empty SA etag"

    buc_log_args "Using etag ${z_etag}"

    buc_log_args '2) Build new policy JSON (bindings unique; version=3; keep etag)'
    local z_updated_policy_json=""
    z_updated_policy_json=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "${z_get_infix}" \
      "${z_role}" "serviceAccount:${z_member_email}" "${z_etag}") \
      || buc_die "Failed to update SA IAM policy"

    buc_log_args '3) setIamPolicy (fatal on 409 — etag mismatch)'
    local z_set_body="${BURD_TEMP_DIR}/rbgi_sa_set_policy_body.json"
    printf '{"policy":%s}\n' "${z_updated_policy_json}" > "${z_set_body}" \
      || buc_die "Failed to build SA setIamPolicy body"

    local z_set_elapsed=0
    local z_set_infix=""
    local z_set_succeeded=0
    while :; do
      z_set_infix="${ZRBGI_INFIX_ROLE_SET}-${z_prop_elapsed}s-${z_set_elapsed}s"
      rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_sa_resource}:setIamPolicy" "${z_token}" \

      local z_set_code=""

      # Check for propagation error on SET — break inner loop to retry outer
      if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_set_infix}" "${z_set_code}" "${z_tolerance[@]}"; then
        buc_log_args "SA setIamPolicy returned ${z_set_code} (propagation delay)"
        break
      fi

      case "${z_set_code}" in
        200)                 z_set_succeeded=1; break ;;
        409)                 buc_die "SA IAM: HTTP 409 ABORTED (etag mismatch — concurrent policy change)" ;;
        429|500|502|503|504) buc_log_args "Transient ${z_set_code} at ${z_set_elapsed}s; retry" ;;
        *)                   rbgu_http_require_ok "Set SA IAM policy" "${z_set_infix}" "" ;;
      esac

      test "${z_set_elapsed}" -lt "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" || buc_die "SA IAM: timeout setting policy"
      sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
      z_set_elapsed=$((z_set_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
    done

    # If setIamPolicy succeeded, break outer propagation loop
    test "${z_set_succeeded}" != "1" || { z_prop_succeeded=1; break; }

    # setIamPolicy hit propagation error — retry outer loop with fresh getIamPolicy
    test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
      || buc_die "SA IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
    buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
    sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
    z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
    z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
    test "${z_prop_delay}" -le "${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}" || z_prop_delay=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}
  done

  test "${z_prop_succeeded}" = "1" || buc_die "SA IAM: propagation retry loop exited without success"

  buc_log_args 'Successfully granted SA role' "${z_role}"
}

        409)                 buc_die "Bucket IAM: HTTP 409 ABORTED (defensive — unexpected for Storage)" ;;
        429|500|502|503|504) buc_log_args "Transient ${z_set_code} at ${z_set_elapsed}s; retry" ;;

    test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
      || buc_die "Bucket IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
    buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
    sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
    z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
    z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
    test "${z_prop_delay}" -le "${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}" || z_prop_delay=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}
  done

  test "${z_prop_succeeded}" = "1" || buc_die "Bucket IAM: propagation retry loop exited without success"

  buc_log_args "Successfully added bucket role ${z_role}"
}

# Grant an IAM role binding on a Secret Manager secret with optimistic concurrency and propagation retry.
rbgi_grant_secret_iam() {
  zrbgi_sentinel

  local -r z_token="${1:-}"
  local -r z_secret_resource_path="${2:-}"
  local -r z_member="${3:-}"
  local -r z_role="${4:-}"
  local -r z_parent_infix="${5:-}"

  test -n "${z_token}"                || buc_die "Token required"
  test -n "${z_secret_resource_path}" || buc_die "Secret resource path required"
  test -n "${z_member}"               || buc_die "Member required"
  test -n "${z_role}"                 || buc_die "Role required"
  test -n "${z_parent_infix}"         || buc_die "Parent infix required"

  buc_log_args "Using admin token (value not logged)"
  buc_log_args "Granting ${z_role} on secret ${z_secret_resource_path} to ${z_member}"

  local -r z_get_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_SECRETMANAGER}${RBGC_SECRETMANAGER_V1}/${z_secret_resource_path}:getIamPolicy?options.requestedPolicyVersion=3"
  local -r z_set_url="${RBGC_API_ROOT_SECRETMANAGER}${RBGC_SECRETMANAGER_V1}/${z_secret_resource_path}:setIamPolicy"

  # Propagation retry — secret is resource-scope: member-visibility 400s plus
  # caller-recently-empowered 403 from the resource-scope IAM cache.
  local -ra z_tolerance=(
    "400" "*does not exist*"
    "400" "*is not deleted*"
    "403" ""
  )

  local z_prop_succeeded=0

  while :; do
    z_prop_attempt=$((z_prop_attempt + 1))
    local z_get_infix="${z_parent_infix}-get-${z_prop_elapsed}s"

    buc_log_args "1) GET secret IAM policy (v3) [attempt ${z_prop_attempt}]"

      buc_log_args "Secret getIamPolicy returned ${z_get_code} (propagation delay)"
      test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
        || buc_die "Secret IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
      buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
      sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
      z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
      z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
      test "${z_prop_delay}" -le "${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}" || z_prop_delay=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}
      continue
    fi

    # Not a propagation error on GET — require success
    rbgu_http_require_ok "Get secret IAM policy" "${z_get_infix}"

    buc_log_args 'Extract etag; require non-empty'
    local z_etag=""
    z_etag=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${z_get_infix}" ".etag") || buc_die "Missing secret etag"
    test -n "${z_etag}" || buc_die "Empty secret etag"

    local z_updated_policy_json=""
    z_updated_policy_json=$(rbgu_jq_add_member_to_role_capture "${z_get_infix}" \
      "${z_role}" "${z_member}" "${z_etag}") \
      || buc_die "Failed to update secret IAM policy"

    buc_log_args '3) setIamPolicy (fatal on 409 — etag mismatch)'
    local z_set_body="${ZRBGI_PREFIX}${z_parent_infix}_set_body.json"
    printf '{"policy":%s}\n' "${z_updated_policy_json}" > "${z_set_body}" \
      || buc_die "Failed to build secret setIamPolicy body"

    local z_set_elapsed=0
    local z_set_infix=""
    local z_set_succeeded=0
    while :; do
      z_set_infix="${z_parent_infix}-set-${z_prop_elapsed}s-${z_set_elapsed}s"
      rbgu_http_json "POST" "${z_set_url}" "${z_token}" "${z_set_infix}" "${z_set_body}"

      local z_set_code=""
      z_set_code=$(rbgu_http_code_capture "${z_set_infix}") || buc_die "No HTTP code from setIamPolicy"

      # Check for propagation error on SET — break inner loop to retry outer
      if zrbgi_propagation_error_predicate "${z_set_infix}" "${z_set_code}" "${z_tolerance[@]}"; then
        buc_log_args "Secret setIamPolicy returned ${z_set_code} (propagation delay)"
        break
      fi

      case "${z_set_code}" in
        200)                 z_set_succeeded=1; break ;;
        409)                 buc_die "Secret IAM: HTTP 409 ABORTED (etag mismatch — concurrent policy change)" ;;
        429|500|502|503|504) buc_log_args "Transient ${z_set_code} at ${z_set_elapsed}s; retry" ;;
        *)                   rbgu_http_require_ok "Set secret IAM policy" "${z_set_infix}" "" ;;
      esac

      test "${z_set_elapsed}" -lt "${RBGC_MAX_CONSISTENCY_SEC}" || buc_die "Secret IAM: timeout setting policy"
      sleep "${RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC}"
      z_set_elapsed=$((z_set_elapsed + RBGC_EVENTUAL_CONSISTENCY_SEC))
    done

    # If setIamPolicy succeeded, break outer propagation loop
    test "${z_set_succeeded}" != "1" || { z_prop_succeeded=1; break; }

    # setIamPolicy hit propagation error — retry outer loop with fresh getIamPolicy
    test "${z_prop_elapsed}" -lt "${z_prop_deadline}" \
      || buc_die "Secret IAM: propagation timeout after ${z_prop_elapsed}s"
    buc_log_args "Retry ${z_prop_attempt} at ${z_prop_elapsed}s (next delay ${z_prop_delay}s)"
    sleep "${z_prop_delay}"
    z_prop_elapsed=$((z_prop_elapsed + z_prop_delay))
    z_prop_delay=$((z_prop_delay * 2))
    test "${z_prop_delay}" -le "${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}" || z_prop_delay=${RBGC_PROPAGATION_MAX_DELAY_SEC}
  done

  test "${z_prop_succeeded}" = "1" || buc_die "Secret IAM: propagation retry loop exited without success"

  buc_log_args "Successfully granted secret role ${z_role}"
}

# eof

file.content:
local z_lifecycle_state
  z_lifecycle_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_STATE}" '.lifecycleState // "UNKNOWN"') || buc_die "Failed to parse project state"

  if test "${z_lifecycle_state}" = "DELETE_REQUESTED"; then
    buc_success "Project successfully marked for deletion"
    buc_step "Project Status: ${z_lifecycle_state}"
    buc_step "Grace period: Up to 30 days"
    buc_code "To restore (if still possible): rbgg_restore_project"
    buc_step "WARNING: Project is now unusable but may remain visible in listings"
  else
    buc_die "Unexpected project state after deletion: ${z_lifecycle_state}"
  fi
}

rbgg_restore_project() {
  zrbgg_sentinel
  buc_doc_brief "Attempt to restore a deleted project within the 30-day grace period"
  buc_doc_shown || return 0

  buc_step 'Mint admin OAuth token'
  local z_token
  z_token=$(rbgu_get_governor_token_capture) || buc_die "Failed to get admin token"

  buc_step 'Check current project state'
  rbgu_http_json "GET" "${RBGD_API_CRM_GET_PROJECT}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_STATE}"

  if ! rbgu_http_is_ok "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_STATE}"; then
    buc_die "Cannot access project - it may have been permanently deleted or never existed"
  fi

  local z_lifecycle_state
  z_lifecycle_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_STATE}" '.lifecycleState // "UNKNOWN"') || buc_die "Failed to parse project state"

  if test "${z_lifecycle_state}" != "DELETE_REQUESTED"; then
    buc_die "Project state is ${z_lifecycle_state} - can only restore projects in DELETE_REQUESTED state"
  fi

  buc_step 'Confirm restoration'
  buc_log_args "Project Status: ${z_lifecycle_state}"
  buc_log_args "Attempting to restore project: ${RBDC_DEPOT_PROJECT_ID}"
  buc_log_args "WARNING: Restore may fail if deletion process has already started"
  buc_require "Confirm restoration of project" "RESTORE"

  buc_step 'Attempt project restoration'
  rbgu_http_json "POST" "${RBGD_API_CRM_UNDELETE_PROJECT}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_RESTORE}"
  if rbgu_http_is_ok                                                    "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_RESTORE}"; then
    buc_step 'Verify restoration'
    rbgu_http_json "GET" "${RBGD_API_CRM_GET_PROJECT}" "${z_token}" "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_STATE}"
    rbgu_http_require_ok "Get restored project state"               "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_STATE}"

    z_lifecycle_state=$(rbgu_json_field_capture "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_STATE}" '.lifecycleState // "UNKNOWN"') || buc_die "Failed to parse restored project state"

    if test "${z_lifecycle_state}" = "ACTIVE"; then
      buc_success "Project successfully restored to ACTIVE state"
      buc_log_args "Project Status: ${z_lifecycle_state}"
      buc_log_args "Project is now usable again"
    else
      buc_die "Restoration completed but project state is unexpected: ${z_lifecycle_state}"
    fi
  else
    local z_error_msg

Agent 7 stopped cleanly **before any edits** — all three files (rbga/rbgb/rbgg) are untouched, no partial state. And there is no `_http_is_ok` predicate anywhere in the kit.

So this is a definite finding I need your call on before I can finish `rbgg_Governor.sh` (80 `rbgu_` refs, blocked on this one token) and run final verification.

**The situation:** `rbgu_http_is_ok` is called twice in `rbgg_restore_project()` (lines 945, 964) but is **defined nowhere** — it was never a real `rbgu_Utility.sh` function, which is why the frozen map doesn't list it. Under `set -euo pipefail`, "command not found" returns 127; at line 945 (`if ! rbgu_http_is_ok …; then buc_die`) the `!` flips 127 to true, so `rbgg_restore_project` **always dies at line 946 today** ("Cannot access project…"). It's a latent, pre-existing bug — the restore path is effectively dead.

This collides with the pace: "behavior-preserving" says don't change it, but "`grep 'rbgu_' Tools/rbk` returns nothing" says the token can't survive. Resolving it is outside the frozen map, so it's your call.

questions.question: rbgu_http_is_ok is an undefined function called in rbgg_restore_project (latent pre-existing bug). How should I resolve it within this pace?

options.label: Fix it (author's intent)
options.description: Add the clearly-intended boolean predicate to rbuh (returns 0 for HTTP 200/201/204 via rbuh_code_capture) and point both call sites at it. This is a small scope addition that makes restore_project actually work — a behavior change, but obviously what the author meant. I'll note it explicitly in the commit/wrap.

  zrbuh_sentinel
  local z_code
  z_code=$(rbuh_code_capture "${1}") || return 1
  case "${z_code}" in 200|201|204) return 0 ;; *) return 1 ;; esac
}
# rbgg_restore_project sites:
  if ! rbuh_code_ok_predicate "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_STATE}"; then ...
  if   rbuh_code_ok_predicate "${ZRBGG_INFIX_PROJECT_RESTORE}"; then ...

options.label: Preserve the break
options.description: Rename the two call sites to a still-undefined rbuh_-prefixed name so behavior is identical (restore_project keeps dying at 946) and the rbgu_ grep clears. Honest downside: leaves a call to a function rbuh does not define — a misleading ghost for future readers. I'd capture it as a scar/itch.
